description.ko: 식물이 순수한 빛, 데이터 스트림, 그리고 수정 구조로 이루어진 디지털 풍경 속에서 진화하는 자연에 대한 선구적인 탐구입니다.
description.en: A visionary exploration of nature evolving within a digital landscape, where flora is constructed from pure light, data streams, and crystalline structures.

prompt: A hyper-realistic cybernetic forest featuring translucent crystalline leaves with embedded glowing fiber-optic veins, bioluminescent neon pollen floating in a dark digital atmosphere, holographic projections of fractal trees, electric blue and magenta color palette, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, intricate macro textures.
